title: SVC Mute Addon
description: Addon for Simple Voice Chat to manage player/group mutes.
body:
# SVC Mute Addon

SVC Mute Addon is an addon for Simple Voice Chat that adds complete voice moderation tools for NeoForge 1.21.1 servers.
It allows server staff to mute players, mute groups, and even enable a full voice lockdown that blocks all voice chat except approved speakers.

This addon is ideal for server events, tournaments, roleplay sessions, community meetings, announcements, and any situation where you need people to stay quiet and let only certain players talk.

With server-controlled muting and a locked-microphone icon on clients, this addon ensures clear communication and prevents interruptions.

## **✨ Features**

Player Muting
Mute or unmute any player instantly. Server-side enforcement ensures players cannot bypass it.

Group Muting (Simple Voice Chat Groups)
Silence entire groups with a single command.

Global Voice Lockdown
Disable everyone’s microphone except selected players. Perfect for events, meetings, and announcements.

Client Feedback (Locked Mic Icon)
Muted players see a locked microphone icon so they know they cannot speak.

Moderation Feedback
Muted players get a chat message announcing they have been muted or unmuted.

Simple Commands
/vcmod mute <player>
/vcmod unmute <player>
/vcmod mutegroup <group>
/vcmod unmutegroup <group>
/vcmod lockdown on|off
/vcmod list

## **🎤 Requirements**

Minecraft 1.21.1

NeoForge 21.1.x

Simple Voice Chat 2.5.36+ (NeoForge version)

## **📦 Installation**

Install Simple Voice Chat (NeoForge).

Drop the addon’s .jar into the /mods folder (server + clients).

Restart the server and connect with SVC enabled.

## **📌 Why Use This Addon?**

Perfect for events with hosts or presenters

Keeps voice chat organized

Prevents trolls or disruptive players

Makes announcements clean and easy

Great for roleplay, streamer events, and moderated communities
